untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Dynamic magnitude thresholds based on 'recent max distance from zero' — requires historical lookback and dynamic calculation not expressible with allowed indicators; (2) Signal line slope persistence counting ('minimum [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] bars in same direction') — requires multi-bar slope tracking not available; (3) Precise threshold parameters [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are undefined in source. Translated using basic MACD zero-line crossover logic as closest approximation.
translation_notes: The original signal requires sophisticated slope persistence and dynamic magnitude comparisons that cannot be fully expressed with the allowed indicator set. Used macd (fast line) and macd_signal alignment with zero line as a reasonable proxy for trend confirmation. Parameters macd_fast_period=3, macd_slow_period=10, signal_line_period=16 are non-standard and may require custom MACD calculation.
